summary: VenuLoQ PWA setup verification - ALL 40 backend tests PASSED, ALL frontend tests PASSED. PWA fully functional with manifest.json, service worker, 11 icons, 6 splash screens, and all required meta tags.

manifest_json.details: name='VenuLoQ', short_name='VenuLoQ', display='standalone', start_url='/', theme_color='#0b0b0f', background_color='#0b0b0f', 11 icons

service_worker.details: sw.js loads with HTTP 200, contains proper caching logic with CACHE_NAME, install/fetch event listeners

icon_files.details: All 11 icon files serve correctly: 48, 72, 96, 128, 144, 152, 192, maskable-192, 384, 512, maskable-512

splash_screens.details: All 6 Apple splash screens serve correctly: iphone-8, iphone-x, iphone-13, iphone-13-pro-max, iphone-14-pro, iphone-14-pro-max

html_meta_tags.details: All required meta tags present: apple-mobile-web-app-capable='yes', apple-mobile-web-app-status-bar-style='black-translucent', apple-mobile-web-app-title='VenuLoQ', theme-color='#0b0b0f'

manifest_link.details: manifest.json link present in HTML head

splash_screen_links.details: 6 apple-touch-startup-image links present in HTML with proper media queries

app_functionality.details: App loads and functions correctly after PWA changes

login_flow.details: Login with democustomer@venulock.in / password123 successful - redirected to /my-enquiries with 'Welcome back!' toast

context_for_next_testing_agent: PWA setup verified working. manifest.json at /manifest.json, sw.js at /sw.js, all 11 icons and 6 splash screens in /frontend/public/. Service worker registration confirmed via console log. Note: Frontend restart was needed after index.html changes to pick up new PWA meta tags - hot reload doesn't update the HTML template.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - All PWA features working correctly
